name: 李智陞
current_positions: Chairman of the People's Action Party (8th)
Member of Parliament (Boon Lay, West Coast-Jurong West GRC)

work_experience.position: Deputy Public Prosecutor, Criminal Justice Division
Associate Director, Legal and Regulations Department
Minister of State, then Senior Minister of State

work_experience.organization: Ministry of Social and Family Development

person_relationships.description: Cabinet colleague; succeeded Wong as Minister for National Development (2020); serves under Wong as PM as Minister for Education and PAP Chairman
Cabinet colleague; Chee succeeded Lee as Minister for National Development when Lee moved to Education in 2025
Father; former Member of Parliament and Cabinet minister
Succeeded Heng Swee Keat as 8th Chairman of PAP in May 2025

political_stances.stance_content: As Minister for National Development, oversaw public housing policies, Singapore's city planning, built environment sector; prioritized HDB flat supply and affordability
As Minister-in-charge of Social Services Integration, focused on enabling families to achieve stability, self-reliance and social mobility through network of Family Service Centres
As Minister for Education, outlined four key areas of focus for MOE

major_achievements.achievement: Entered politics; won Jurong GRC with 66.96% of the vote
Re-elected in Jurong GRC with 79.3% of the vote, one of the highest margins in GE2015
Promoted to full Cabinet minister, becoming Minister for Social and Family Development
Elected to PAP Central Executive Committee for the first time
Led PAP team in West Coast-Jurong West GRC to victory with 59.99% against PSP
Appointed 8th Chairman of the People's Action Party, succeeding Heng Swee Keat
Appointed Minister for Education in Second Lawrence Wong Cabinet

biography_summary: Desmond Lee Ti-Seng (born 15 July 1976) is a Singaporean politician and lawyer who has served as Chairman of the People's Action Party since 2025, Minister for Education since 2025, and Minister-in-charge of Social Services Integration since 2020. The son of former Cabinet minister Lee Yock Suan, he graduated from NUS Law with first class honours and holds a BCL from Oxford. He worked as a Justices' Law Clerk, Deputy Public Prosecutor at AGC, and held legal positions at MOH, MinLaw, and Temasek Holdings before entering politics in 2011. He has held various ministerial portfolios: MND (2013-2015, 2020-2025), MSF (2017-2020), and MOE (2025-present). He was elected PAP Chairman in May 2025. He is married with three children.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with detailed legal career (AGC, MOH, MinLaw, Temasek Holdings), family background (father Lee Yock Suan - former Cabinet minister), education details (NUS Law First Class Honours, Oxford BCL), social media accounts (Facebook, Instagram), PAP Chairman appointment, GE2025 results, and relationships with Lawrence Wong and Chee Hong Tat.
